summary: Forensic Classification Feature Testing - 100% PASS. All 29 backend tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working. Classification correctly categorizes orders into 5 types based on payment evidence. Repair flow works with dry-run preview and execute with audit trail.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: GET /api/data-audit/classify returns 5 categories with counts, totalValue, needsRepair
Good: Each order has evidence object with allocTotal, payTotal, toggleLogCount etc
Good: Each order has current vs expected values for comparison
Good: POST /api/data-audit/repair/preview shows only orders where needsRepair=true
Good: Preview shows byAction breakdown (SET_FROM_ALLOCATIONS, SET_AS_UNPAID, etc)
Good: POST /api/data-audit/repair/execute requires changedBy for audit trail
Good: Execute creates audit log for each repair with PAYMENT_STATUS_REBUILD action
Good: Post-repair validation runs 4 integrity checks automatically
Good: Frontend shows Forensic Classification card on Dashboard tab
Good: Frontend displays 5 color-coded summary cards with counts and values
Good: Frontend shows detail tables per category with order data
Good: Step 2 Preview button appears only when repairs needed
Good: Step 3 Execute button appears only after preview
seed_data_creation: Repair executed on CRASH-TEST-001 (SUSPICIOUS_PAID→CREDIT_UNPAID) and CRASH-TEST-003 (partial→unpaid) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forensic Classification fully tested. Key data: 35 orders total. Current distribution: 3 RECEIPT_PAID, 10 PARTIAL_PAID, 0 CASH_SALE, 22 CREDIT_UNPAID, 0 SUSPICIOUS_PAID. Repairs were executed - CRASH-TEST-001 and CRASH-TEST-003 both moved to unpaid status. totalNeedsRepair is now 0.

PASSED: GET /api/data-audit/classify - has 5 main categories in summary
GET /api/data-audit/classify - each category has count, totalValue, needsRepair
GET /api/data-audit/classify - categories section has order arrays
GET /api/data-audit/classify - each order has orderId, orderNumber, total
GET /api/data-audit/classify - each order has current (paidAmount, dueAmount, paymentStatus)
GET /api/data-audit/classify - each order has expected (paidAmount, dueAmount, paymentStatus)
GET /api/data-audit/classify - each order has evidence (allocTotal, allocCount, etc)
GET /api/data-audit/classify - each order has fieldCorrect and needsRepair flags
POST /api/data-audit/repair/preview - only shows orders with needsRepair=true
POST /api/data-audit/repair/execute - returns validation when repairs happen
SUSPICIOUS_PAID orders have zero evidence (alloc, payment, toggle)
Frontend: Forensic Classification Card visible on Dashboard
Frontend: Detail tables show order data per category
Frontend: Step 2 Preview button appears when repairs needed
Frontend: Step 3 Execute button appears after preview

frontend_verification.repair_preview_btn: PASS - correctly hidden when no repairs needed

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/data-audit/classify: WORKING - returns 5 categories with full order details
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/data-audit/repair/preview: WORKING - shows repair plan per category
